case_title: CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS ALFEREZ, ERIC

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JUN-16-2004, CONTINUED BY COURT TO DEC-16-2004 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 DEFT HAS AGREED TO A PAYMENT PLAN OF $200/MONTH BEGINNING 7/1/04. PLTF REQUESTS A CONTINUANCE TO LET THE PAYMENT PLAN WORK.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ALFEREZ, ERIC $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $30.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,030.50, DEFENDANT FAILED TO APPEAR. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $4,411.68 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT ALFEREZ, ERIC
APPLICATION FOR RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT ALFEREZ, ERIC NOTICE OF RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT ISSUED

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT ALFEREZ, ERIC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-16-2004 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC. 683.110 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ALFEREZ, ERIC $9,442.18 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $9,442.18, (PRINCIPAL INCLUDES INTEREST AFTER JUDGMENT)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ALFEREZ, ERIC
